nasb.text: You shall set the table outside the veil, and the lampstand opposite the table on the side of the tabernacle toward the south; and you shall put the table on the north side.

esv.text: And you shall set the table outside the veil, and the lampstand on the south side of the tabernacle opposite the table, and you shall put the table on the north side.

cnv.text: 你要把桌子放在幔幕外，把燈臺放在會幕的南邊，與桌子相對；把桌子安在北面。

ccb.text: 桌子要放在幔子的外面、圣所的北面，灯台放在南面，跟桌子相对。
